sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85317" key="polu/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-σῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many defects</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blemishes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:111:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
